# LIYON Global Enterprise

> AI products and open source tools by LIYON Global Enterprise Co., Ltd.

## Company

- Name: LIYON Global Enterprise Co., Ltd. (立盈國際興業股份有限公司)
- Founded by: Theone Lin
- Focus: AI-powered business automation and developer tools
- Website: https://liyoncso-theone.github.io/Liyon-Global/

## Products

### ProBrain (企業大腦)
AI clinic operations director for aesthetics and dental practices. Post-op care automation, anomaly detection, inventory FEFO control, compliance marketing — all inside LINE.
- URL: https://liyon-products.pages.dev/probrain/

### CloakFetch (企業透視)
Taiwan business data API. 1.8M companies, sub-5ms response. REST API for CRM, risk systems, and AI agents.
- URL: https://liyon-products.pages.dev/cloakfetch/

### PhantomDecomp (數據煉金)
Enterprise heterogeneous data integration and governance. Validated on 489M records, 4 sources, 25.75 GB on a single 32GB machine.
- URL: https://liyon-products.pages.dev/phantomdecomp/

### SlideFlow (簡報解鎖)
AI presentation editor. Upload locked PDF/PPTX, AI recognizes all text, edit freely, export to editable PowerPoint. 100% free, 100% browser-based.
- URL: https://slideflow-ch3.pages.dev/

### LIYON Scribe (智錄)
On-device AI transcription workstation. Offline-first speech-to-text with 5 professional context modes (church, tech, medical, legal, general). 280+ biblical terminology hotwords. Free forever.
- URL: https://liyon-products.pages.dev/scribe/

### vibe-state-cli (Open Source)
Persistent AI memory across coding tools. One shared brain for Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, Cline, Roo Code, GitHub Copilot, Gemini CLI. MIT license.
- GitHub: https://github.com/liyoncso-Theone/vibe-state-cli
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/vibe-state-cli/
- URL: https://liyoncso-theone.github.io/Liyon-Global/vibe-state-cli.html
